metadata.title: CheckResult — CIM engine policy evaluation result

description: CIM engine output — the result of evaluating one constitutional rule against one target. Renamed from Finding per ADR-056 D2 (2026-05-18): the name Finding is reserved for the constitutional blackboard governance entity. This contract governs CheckResult's own declared field shape. A separate governance entry (data.contracts.finding_nucleus_conforms) governs CheckResult against the canonical Finding nucleus in Finding.json, intentionally producing drift findings that surface the gap between CheckResult's engine-output vocabulary (id, rule, recommendation, links) and the nucleus vocabulary (rule_id, subject, worker_uuid). That gap is the constitutional visibility ADR-056 D3 exists to provide. NOTE: CheckResult.severity uses values BLOCK/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/INFO (Pydantic Literal); audit_severity enum in .intent/META/enums.json (D5) declares the same values — no discrepancy. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.

id.description: Unique identifier for this check result instance.

severity.description: Severity level of the finding. Governed vocabulary: BLOCK, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO. Matches audit_severity enum in .intent/META/enums.json (ADR-056 D5).

rule.description: The rule identifier that this check result reports against. Note: corresponds to rule_id in the Finding nucleus — the name difference is the documented drift.

evidence.description: Human-readable description of what was found. Matches evidence in the Finding nucleus.

recommendation.description: Actionable recommendation for resolving the finding.

links.description: Reference links for further context. Default empty list.
